name: NotificationList
description: A notification feed with categorized items showing timestamps, read/unread state, and action buttons. Ideal for activity feeds, notification centers, and event logs in agent interfaces.

visual.description: Vertical list of notification items within a card. Each item shows an icon/avatar, title, description, and timestamp. Unread items have a blue accent dot and slightly different background. Items are separated by subtle dividers. Top toolbar has mark-all-read and filter controls.

props.name: notifications
props.description: Array of notification objects with id, title, description, timestamp, read, type ('info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'), and optional icon

props.name: showMarkAllRead
props.description: Whether to show the mark-all-read button
